query:
UPDATE leases_v6
            SET leased = $4, expires_at = $5, probation = $6, client_id = $7
            WHERE prefix_len = 128 AND addr IN
               (
                    SELECT addr FROM leases_v6
                    WHERE prefix_len = 128
                      AND ((expires_at > $1) AND (client_id = $2) AND (addr = $3))
                    ORDER BY addr LIMIT 1
               )
            RETURNING addr
